summary: Energetic audience recording that captures the show’s vibe, though not as crisp as Kutik’s version.
review: The reviewer rates this tape as their personal favorite for the concert, praising its energetic and immersive feel compared to other audience recordings. While acknowledging that Kutik’s tape has slightly better clarity, they prefer this one for how it puts you in the middle of the action.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive review highlights a strong performance and an engaging recording despite minor clarity issues, leading to an overall solid rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: More immersive and energetic than comparable audience tape; slightly less clear/detail than the higher‑fidelity Kutik’s recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply loves the overall concert experience.
